<!-- GENERATED by scripts/build-skills.ts — do not edit by hand. Edit the token source or design-md/prose/skills/, then run `npm run build:skills`. -->

# Orbit audit checklist

Every contract below is **machine-enforced** by `scripts/design-system-static-audit.mjs`.
Run `npm run audit:design-system` to verify a change against them. Use this list when
reviewing or building Orbit UI; treat each row as a must-pass.

| # | Contract | Remediation if it fails |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | All non-submit buttons declare type="button" | — |
| 2 | Orbit components do not import prototype mock data | Remove product/mock-data imports from reusable components. |
| 3 | Orbit reusable components avoid raw hex colors | Use Orbit tokens or component-local CSS variables instead of raw hex values. |
| 4 | Font Awesome icons render as Regular by default | FaIcon should not expose or accept a Solid weight override. |
| 5 | Dropdown trigger is programmatically labelled | Dropdown trigger must link visual label/value or an explicit standalone name to the focusable button. |
| 6 | Input has an explicit accessible-name contract | Input should require a reliable accessible name and cover it with a DOM test. |
| 7 | Input family shares the accessible-name contract | Textbox, TextArea, CurrencyInput, DateInput, Searchbox, and Dropdown should require an intentional accessible name. |
| 8 | Checkbox relies on a native checkbox input | Checkbox should not use a separate focusable role=checkbox span. |
| 9 | Toggle relies on a native switch input | Toggle should use native checkbox behavior with switch semantics. |
| 10 | Overlay has accessible naming and focus restoration | Overlay must expose a dialog name and restore focus on close. |
| 11 | InlineBanner matches the feedback strip contract | InlineBanner should have a tokenized icon box, a component-scoped Style 1 token, documented None outline behavior, and reference showcase coverage. |
| 12 | Banner is disambiguated from InlineBanner | The multiline alert block should be exported as Alert while Banner remains a documented compatibility shim. |
| 13 | Tooltip describes the actual trigger element | Tooltip should attach aria-describedby to its child trigger. |
| 14 | PageHeader separates controlled and default tab state | PageHeader should support controlled activeTab/onTabChange and uncontrolled defaultActiveTab without read-only tabs. |
| 15 | PageHeader icon-only actions require a meaningful name | PageHeader should not fall back to a generic icon-only action label. |
| 16 | SideNav renders sections from data without hard-coded indexes | SideNav should not depend on fixed section indexes or absolute section layout. |
| 17 | SideNav expansion state is keyed by stable ids | SideNav expansion state should be keyed by section.id, not section.label. |
| 18 | SideNav default width is token-owned | SideNav should use --orbit-sidenav-width as the default and only set an inline width override when the width prop is passed. |
| 19 | DESIGN.md generation reports validation truthfully | — |
| 20 | Design-system docs chrome avoids raw sidebar colors and legacy width | Docs sidebar/header chrome should use Orbit tokens instead of raw colors or the old 232px width. |
| 21 | Card remains a non-interactive container | Card should not expose button or selection semantics; put actions on child buttons or links. |
| 22 | RadialIndicator clamps invalid progress | RadialIndicator should clamp progress to 0-100 before SVG math. |
| 23 | Table exposes selectable rows through native buttons | Selectable tables should expose a named native button inside the row instead of relying on focusable tr elements. |
| 24 | Dropzone uses semantic choose-file control | Dropzone should expose a named group, native file input, and semantic choose-files button. |
| 25 | Spinner supports labelled and decorative loading | Spinner should be usable as a labelled status or hidden decoration beside visible loading text. |
| 26 | Primitives expose semantic hooks | Text, Separator, and Breadcrumb should expose semantic behavior. |
| 27 | Component DOM test stack is configured | Vitest, jsdom, and focused component tests should be available for design-system acceptance. |

_27 checks. Generated from the audit script — if you add a check there,
re-run `npm run build:skills` to update this list._
